description.ko: 수백만 년의 지질 활동과 자연 침식으로 형성된 복잡하고 가공되지 않은 질감을 조명하며, 지형적 관점에서 지구 표면을 상세히 탐구합니다.
description.en: A detailed exploration of the planet's surface through a topographical lens, highlighting the complex and raw textures formed by millions of years of geological activity and natural erosion.

prompt: Ultra-high-resolution satellite photography of Earth's diverse topography, focusing on the intricate textures of crystalline salt flats, layered sedimentary rock formations, deep oceanic trenches, and swirling Sahara sand dunes. Top-down cinematic perspective, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic geological details, natural earth tones, sharp focus on surface erosion patterns.
